tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS - April 2024

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics prepared for the April 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
April 2024
This performance metrics document was prepared for the April 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Cathy Rinaldi

evidence_refs.source_quote: Cathy Rinaldi President, Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Rob Free

evidence_refs.source_quote: Rob Free President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Project

payload.description: Large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct which dates back to the late 1800s. Phase 1 spans from 115 to 123 Streets. Carries approximately 750 trains daily to and from Grand Central Terminal.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We are currently in the midst of a large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct, which dates back to the late 1800s and carries approximately 750 trains and thousands of customers to and from Grand Central Terminal every week day. Phase 1 of the construction spans from 115 to 123 Streets.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Signage Updated for ADA & Safety Compliance

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Signage Updated for ADA & Safety Compliance
payload.description: MTA Construction & Development is updating signage on multiple Grand Central Terminal station platforms to meet ADA and safety code compliance. Entire replacement slated for completion in Q4 2025.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month, MTA Construction & Development is updating signage on multiple Grand Central Terminal station platforms to meet ADA and safety code compliance.
The entire replacement is slated for completion in Q4 2025.

tool_args.label: Demolition of Hempstead Substation

payload.description: LIRR and MTA Construction and Development closed out the demolition of the old Hempstead Substation. Demolition completed in 2023 with punch list items recently completed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month, LIRR and MTA Construction and Development closed out the demolition of the old Hempstead Substation. This outdated infrastructure was decommissioned in 2009 following the construction of a new modular replacement system. While demolition was completed in 2023, there were time consuming and challenging punch list items that were recently completed to conclude the project.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Climate Resilience Roadmap

payload.description: Comprehensive strategy necessitating a $6 billion investment over the next decade to fortify MTA infrastructure against challenges posed by climate change. From upgrading train yards to enhancing signal systems.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA has embarked on initiatives such as implementing our new Climate Resilience Roadmap. This comprehensive strategy will necessitate a $6 billion investment over the next decade to fortify our infrastructure against the challenges posed by climate change.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We are currently in the midst of a large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct, which dates back to the late 1800s.

payload.description: Large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct which dates back to the late 1800s. Phase 1 spans from 115 to 123 Streets.

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR combined 250K+ riders at Grand Central on April 9

payload.description: For the first time, Metro-North and LIRR - upstairs at Grand Central Terminal and downstairs in Grand Central Madison - combined to serve over a quarter million customers in a single day.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On April 9th, for the first time, Metro-North and LIRR – upstairs at Grand Central Terminal and downstairs in Grand Central Madison -- combined to serve over a quarter million customers in a single day.

tool_args.label: LIRR 190th Anniversary Celebration

payload.description: LIRR celebrated 190th Anniversary at Grand Central Madison. On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered... we paid homage to it all at our 190th Anniversary celebration at Grand Central Madison on the 24th.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: Metro-North Skilled Craft Open House at Croton-Harmon

payload.description: Metro-North held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon highlighting skilled craft opportunities. 585 prospective job applicants attended.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Saturday, April 20, we held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon to highlight opportunities for skilled craft opportunities at the railroad. The event was a resounding success. We had anticipated that approximately 300 people would attend, but we actually welcomed 585 potential job applicants to this event.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Total Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: In March 2024, Metro-North served 5.3 million customers, a ridership increase of 9.3% from last March and representing 75% of March 2019's ridership.

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Ridership Increase vs March 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: a ridership increase of 9.3% from last March

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Ridership as Percent of March 2019

evidence_refs.source_quote: representing 75% of March 2019's ridership

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2024 Total Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: March 2024 ridership increased 17.2% compared to March 2023, representing 79.4% of March 2019.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2024 Ridership Increase vs March 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: March 2024 total ridership increased 17.2% compared to March 2023

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Systemwide On-Time Performance

evidence_refs.source_quote: Systemwide on-time performance (OTP) for March was at 98.9%, above our goal of 94%.

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2024 On-Time Performance

evidence_refs.source_quote: March total OTP came in above 95% for the third straight month – at 95.95%

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison March 2024 Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: GCM ridership reached 1,562,822 customers (based on load weigh data), which was the highest ridership recorded.

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Service Delivered Rate

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North's March service-delivered rate, a measure of service reliability, was 99.9%.

tool_args.label: LIRR GCM Weekday Share

payload.raw_value_text: 35% share for trips to GCM and 65% share to Penn Station on weekdays
payload.description: Share of LIRR weekday trips arriving at Grand Central Madison vs Penn Station

evidence_refs.source_quote: Customers are shifting toward 35% share for trips to GCM and 65% share to Penn Station on weekdays

tool_args.label: LIRR GCM Weekend Share

payload.raw_value_text: 31% of the trips arrive at GCM and 69% arrive at Penn Station on weekends
payload.description: Share of LIRR weekend trips arriving at Grand Central Madison vs Penn Station

evidence_refs.source_quote: On weekends, 31% of the trips arrive at GCM and 69% arrive at Penn Station.

tool_args.label: LIRR 190th Anniversary Celebration

payload.description: LIRR celebrated 190th Anniversary at Grand Central Madison. On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered as the soon-to-be-built first leg in a New York-to-Boston service whereby you'd take a train from Brooklyn out to Greenport and then hop on a ferry across the Long Island Sound.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Skilled Craft Open House at Croton-Harmon

payload.description: Metro-North held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon highlighting skilled craft opportunities. 585 prospective job applicants attended.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Saturday, April 20, we held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon to highlight opportunities for skilled craft opportunities at the railroad.

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2024 Total Ridership
Harlem Line Signal Box Elevation at MP 25.7

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is taking action to improve system ability to withstand effects of climate change. The Harlem Line Signal Box elevation at MP 25.7, situated within the grade crossing at Cleveland St and Lakeview Ave, addresses recurring flooding issues by elevating the box with additional standard 4' signal foundations and repurposing available materials such as reclaimed concrete ties and recycled ballast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: One notable example of our proactive approach is the Harlem Line Signal Box elevation at MP 25.7, situated within the grade crossing starting at Cleveland St and Lakeview Ave.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Mean Distance Between Failures February 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The mean distance between failures for the fleet was 637,602 miles in February 2024, above the goal of 200,000 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR Mean Distance Between Failures February 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The fleet mean distance between failures... operated at 172,398 miles in February, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR April 9 Weekday Ridership

payload.description: 2nd highest post-COVID weekday ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2nd highest post-COVID weekday ridership total on Tuesday, April 9th with 251,964 customers
2nd highest weekday ridership on Tuesday, April 9th with 251,964 customers since the pandemic

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Average Weekday Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: Average weekday ridership of 201,205 was 11.8% higher than March 2023

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2024 Average Weekend Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: average weekend ridership up 27.7% to 109,681

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2024 Average Weekday Ridership Change vs Feb 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The average weekday ridership in March 2024 increased +7.0% compared to February 2024.

tool_args.label: LIRR Mean Distance Between Failures February 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The fleet mean distance between failures, a metric that measures the average number of miles a railcar or locomotive travels before failing and causing a delay, operated at 172,398 miles in February, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.
